results.title: Hal Turner Radio Show – White House Shooter, Age 21, Killed by Secret Service
results.description: A crazed gunman who believed he was Jesus Christ pulled out a revolver and opened fire outside the White House Saturday night, before he was quickly taken down by a barrage of shots from the Secret Service. Nasire Best, 21, fired at a checkpoint at about 6:10 p.m. after being seen pacing in a strange [...] The post Hal Turner Radio Show – White House Shooter, Age 21, Killed by Secret Service appeared first on CBNC .

results.description: David Warner says IPL team Sunrisers Hyderabad will 'never' unblock him on Instagram.

results.title: White House Shooter Claimed To Be 'Real Osama Bin Laden', Threatened Trump: Report
results.description: The suspect, identified as 21-year-old Nasire Best, had made a threat to Trump on social media.

results.title: Abhishek Banerjee seeks time from KMC to respond to demolition notice
results.description: Trinamool Congress leader Abhishek Banerjee has sought time from the Kolkata Municipal Corporation (KMC) to reply to the notice regarding the valuation of his property and the demolition of an illegal part of his house at Bhabanipur.

results.title: Sachin Tendulkar shares heartfelt note for son Arjun after his first IPL 2026 appearance for LSG
results.description: Legendary former batter Sachin Tendulkar wrote a heartfelt note for his son Arjun Tendulkar who featured in the 2026 Indian Premier League for the first time yesterday during Lucknow Super Giants' 7-wicket defeat against the Punjab Kings at the Ekana Stadium

results.title: India and US Strengthen Ties: Jaishankar Outlines Five Key Principles
results.description: External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar recently outlined a five-point strategy to enhance India-US relations during discussions with US Secretary of State Marco Rubio. The meeting, held in New Delhi, emphasized the importance of dialogue, maritime commerce, and adherence to international law. Both leaders expressed optimism about finalizing an interim trade agreement and strengthening defense cooperation. Jaishankar's principles aim to address global challenges and foster resilient partnerships, reflecting a commitment to a robust strategic alliance. Rubio echoed this sentiment, highlighting the positive trajectory of India-US relations. Discover more about their discussions and future collaborations.

results.title: 11 test pilots, 6 flight engineers pass out from AFTPS
results.description: Seventeen officers completed a 48-week training program at the Air Force Test Pilots School. The graduating batch included personnel from the Indian Air Force, Army, and Navy. Chief of Air Staff Air Chief Marshal AP Singh presented awards to outstanding performers. The officers will now join the Aircraft and Systems Testing Establishment.

results.title: Rajasthan Horror: Husband Slits Wife's Throat, Then Injures Self In Suicide Attempt; CCTV Video Surfaces
results.description: A 30-year-old woman named Kanta was killed by her husband, Nitesh Kumar Jingar, during an argument in Rajasthan’s Balotra district on Saturday. Police said the accused attacked her with a knife near her maternal home in Siwana area, killing her on the spot. After the incident, Nitesh allegedly stabbed himself in the throat and stomach.

results.title: White Aura meaning: How to heal a weak white aura and balance your crown chakra
results.description: When your white aura is balanced, you feel protected and spiritually connected. You trust divine timing and feel aligned with your path.

results.title: Fadnavis mocks Rahul Gandhi’s NDA collapse remark as ‘daydreaming’
results.description: Devendra Fadnavis dismissed Rahul Gandhi’s prediction that the NDA government would collapse within a year, calling it “daydreaming.” Speaking in Nagpur, Fadnavis also highlighted Maharashtra’s logistics push aimed at boosting global competitiveness and reducing business costs

results.title: She Defended KJo In Nepotism Debate, Said He Helped Her When She Was 'Nobody', Is Now Among Top Actresses
results.description: Kiara Advani once revealed that Karan Johar took her in and supported her career even when she was being rejected for being a ‘nobody’ in the film industry.

results.title: Another week of heatwave in north India, red alert for East UP from May 24 to 26
results.description: Fresh western disturbance from May 28 are likely to bring some respite from the scorching summer heat that has gripped much of north India.
